case_title: CICORNIO, RONALD LOUIS vs. RYALS, CARL ALLEN et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CICORNIO, RONALD LOUIS AS TO DEFENDANT RYALS, CARL ALLEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-14-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-14-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-25-1994
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CICORNIO, RONALD LOUIS SERVED NOV-08-1993, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RYALS, CARL ALLEN
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-14-1994, CONTINUED TO APR-15-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT BY 4/15/94. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-15-1994, CONTINUED TO JUN-14-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT BY 6/14/94. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-14-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUN-14-1994, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUL-14-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CICORNIO, RONALD LOUIS
OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-14-1994, CONTINUED TO SEP-12-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 9/6/94. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CICORNIO, RONALD LOUIS SERVED APR-02-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RYALS, CARL ALLEN

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $245.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $1,500.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CICORNIO, RONALD LOUIS AS TO DEFENDANT RYALS, CARL ALLEN
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-12-1994, CONTINUED TO NOV-14-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY 11/7/94. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-14-1994, CONTINUED TO DEC-29-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DEFAULT OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO DISMISS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-29-1994, CONTINUED TO JAN-31-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-31-1995, OFF CALENDAR
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CICORNIO, RONALD LOUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RYALS, CARL ALLEN $14,250.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,250.00, STIPULATED- SEE TERMS OF STIPULATION NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
